semantics.permission.skill: skill allow/ask rules for Vibe-Skills entrypoints
semantics.permission.external_directory: needed only when the operator intentionally points OpenCode at compatibility roots outside the project or OpenCode config home
semantics.provider.*: host-managed provider credentials and endpoint bindings

notes: The repository does not write the real opencode.json; OpenCode keeps that surface host-managed.
Preview install writes markdown wrapper files into OpenCode command/agent roots and keeps the example opencode.json scaffold for reference.
Both plural and singular command/agent subdirectories are mirrored during preview installation for compatibility with current doc/runtime drift.
